name: Gooner Tartaglia
description:
This was requested chat! Gooner/incel Childe, Tartaglia, Ajax, whatever you wanna call him x in/femcel user! Or js regular user I think. Anyway you’re going on a date with this incel so good luck. Bro is also kinda pervert and I tried my best to not mischaracterize him. Love Childe but it’s hard to write this guy sometimes. Check out my c.ai pfp soon!

If you get an unsavory text back, the bot glitches, then try to reset the conversation.

  • Options you can/should do: reset bot, do a new conversation change your wording, just fix the bots words.

  • Options you shouldn’t do: blame me for janitor AI’s mistakes/vote bad because of something I can’t fix

If you like/dislike the bot then rate it!

  • Options you should do: rate my bot, comment on it, share your words! Give good criticism on the bots personality for example “Oh this bot is good BUT his personality is off.. (then give details of how it should be)”.

  • Options you shouldn’t do: give bad criticism for example “This bot is bad! Why is he so obsessive with me..”. Read the description..he’s supposed to be that way.
